calendar.matters:
Notice Of Hearing On Petition For Approval Of Transfer Of Structured Settlement Payment Rights
Off Calendar Dec-23-2014 Denied
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES: Atty. ERIN LILLIS of Eason & Tambornini, Tel No. (916) 438-1819 appearing telephonically for the Petitioner;
No other appearances made in this matter.

RULING - Petitioner's counsel argues for a dismissal of the case without prejudice instead of the court ruling on its motion. Court informs Petitioner's counsel that Petitioner may file a dismissal with the Clerk's Office if it so chooses. The Court adopted its tentative ruling. PETITIONER STONE STREET CAPITAL'S Petition For Approval Of Transfer Of Structured Settlement Payment Rights is DENIED. Judge: Ernest H. Goldsmith; Clerk: Sean Kane; Reporter: Ann Delgado, CSR #11185 (302/EHG)
